bridie.name: Bridie
bridie.title: The Hearth Keeper
bridie.feature: Disciple of Life: Your healing spells are more potent, always bringing comfort and courage.
bridie.tagline: The oven always gets hot, but so do I when my family needs me to show up.

log.change: Acted despite the 'Whispers of Doubt' that often clouded her judgment under pressure.
log.why: To be the beacon of hope and healing her loved ones desperately needed in a dark moment.
